Subject: Meridian contract review

Hi Alex, can we push the Meridian contract review call to Thursday afternoon? Sam is out until Wednesday and wants to be on the call before we sign.

Subject: Invoice #4471 overdue

This is a reminder that invoice #4471 for the Brand A retainer, due June 30, remains unpaid. Please process payment or let us know of any dispute.

textForEmbedding: Asana task: QA the Q3 product launch landing page before the newsletter send. Assignee: Dana. Project: Q3 Launch. Status: complete.

textForEmbedding: Org knowledge: Brand A voice guide. Keep replies warm but concise. Never use exclamation points in client-facing invoice or billing correspondence. Sign off with first name only.
textForContext: Brand A voice guide — warm but concise tone; no exclamation points on billing correspondence; sign off with first name only.

textForEmbedding: Org knowledge: Escalation policy. Any overdue invoice past 15 days should be escalated to the account owner directly rather than auto-replied to by the agent.
textForContext: Escalation policy — overdue invoices past 15 days must be escalated to the account owner, not auto-replied.

textForEmbedding: User preference: Alex prefers to sign emails 'Best, Alex' and never 'Best regards' or 'Sincerely'. Prefers replies under 120 words when possible.
textForContext: Alex's style preference — sign-off "Best, Alex"; replies under 120 words when possible.

textForEmbedding: User preference: Alex only takes external calls Tuesday through Thursday, 1pm-5pm ET. Do not propose Monday or Friday meeting times.
textForContext: Alex's scheduling preference — external calls only Tue-Thu 1-5pm ET; never propose Monday or Friday.
